title: Gui's Better Vanilla
description: Enhance your Minecraft vanilla experience with stunning new visuals!
body:
---

**Gui's Better Vanilla** is a resource pack focused on keeping the spirit of vanilla Minecraft. The goal is to enhance the vanilla experience without straying too far from the original look. Some of this resource pack is inspired by the **Minecraft Movie event.**

This resource pack works in any Minecraft version above 1.20.2, but full compatibility and complete functionality are guaranteed only from version 1.21.4 onwards.

If you want a pack for only the GUI & UI of this resource pack you can find it here:

---

AppleSkin mod

Overflowingbars mod

Axiom mod

If you'd like to support me, you can donate to my Paypal!

Any amount helps me out a ton to continue updating and working on this resource pack!

---

Each feature has an image in the gallery showing it!

- New sprites to many items. - New player and horse armor colors to match the item sprites. - New Trident Model (TRIDENT AFTER THROWING IS ONLY VISIBLE WITH **OPTIFINE** OR **EMF** MOD)

- A new view for heart, armor, food containers and xp bar. - Some changes in the slots of armor, shields, and more. - Improved recipe book visibility. - Simpler buttons in the menu. - (**JUST IN: ENGLISH/PORTUGUESE/ESPAÑOL**) Enchanted items now have the enchantment name in yellow and the level in green.

- Rain, Snow and Fire effects are now less intrusive. - New flowers and saplings ---

Created by GuiiVicent.

Some textures were taken from the Minecraft Movie Event in Minecraft: Bedrock Edition. All rights to the original textures are owned by Mojang Studios.

The armor sprites were created using Pixelstoriez's work as reference, you can find him on Instagram under that name or check out his resource pack, "Pixalette."
